title: Luffy Destroys the Room
description: On pages 13–16, luffy destroys the room focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.
scene: On pages 13–16, luffy destroys the room focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: L-Look! After that impact just now, Arlong Park is...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's too dangerous! Everyone evacuate immediately- lately!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
